name: system-info
description: Comprehensive system diagnostic — gathers identity, activations, credentials, storage, network, persistence state, and backs up key files to SD card. Single pass, no flash writes.
author: dspl1236
scripts: sysinfo_dump.sh - Full diagnostic + backup to SD card
notes: v2.0: Consolidated system-info + password-finder + variant-dump + persistence-dump into single comprehensive diagnostic. Uses sed instead of head/tail (not available on QNX). Runs entirely from SD card.
